title: CatalystAI
description: Cover slide with hero molecular imagery and CatalystAI lockup.

title: The Problem
description: India's catalyst R&D bottleneck — import bill, decade-long cycles, paper notebooks, SAF mandate.

title: Our Solution
description: Closed-loop discovery: propose with Claude, validate in the wet lab, learn from every result.

title: Direction 1: Chemical Catalysis
description: Heterogeneous catalyst families ranked for ethanol-to-jet, CO₂ hydrogenation, and methanol synthesis.

title: Direction 2: Synthetic Biology
description: Engineered strains and enzyme variants for ethanol fermentation and biomass conversion.

title: Pilot: GPS Renewables
description: Ethanol-to-jet pilot case study with cycle compression, candidate ranking, and accuracy gains.

title: AI Architecture
description: Claude Sonnet 4 augmented with PubChem and ChEMBL evidence, closed by a wet-lab feedback loop.

title: Impact for Bharat
description: A sovereign discovery stack across energy, materials, and pharma verticals.

title: Roadmap
description: Three-phase roadmap from GPS Renewables pilot to multi-lab rollout to national discovery layer.

title: Thank You
description: Closing slide with vision statement, hackathon credits, and pilot partner.
